untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition capability (broadening top identification, pattern height measurement as percentage of breakout price, median height classification) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal relies on visual/structural pattern analysis rather than technical indicators. Additionally, the regime-specific performance metrics (39%, 21%, -17%, -21%, 22%, 28%) cannot be encoded as entry/exit conditions without a pattern detection mechanism.
translation_notes: This is a pattern-based signal that requires identifying broadening top formations and measuring their relative height—a capability that requires candlestick pattern recognition beyond the scope of the available technical indicators. The allowed indicators are primarily price-action and oscillator-based; they cannot detect or classify broadening top patterns. A workaround would require adding a 'pattern_type' or 'broadening_top_detected' indicator to the allowed set.
